# Sunshine State Junk Removal & Dumpster Rental

Family- and veteran-owned junk removal and dump-trailer rental company serving Broward County, Florida — with select service in Miami-Dade and Palm Beach Counties.

## Business snapshot
- Name: Sunshine State Junk Removal & Dumpster Rental
- Owners: Cesar Hurtado (U.S. military veteran) and Lynzee Hurtado
- Rating: 5.0 stars across 159+ Google reviews
- Positioning: family-owned, veteran-owned, licensed & insured, transparent volume-based pricing, same-day availability, 24/7 for urgent jobs
- Phone / SMS: (954) 247-1399
- Email: info@sunshineremoval.com
- Website: https://sunshineremoval.com
- Hours: Open 24/7
- Discounts: military, veterans, seniors, first responders

## Services
- Junk Removal — full-service pickup and hauling of household clutter, furniture, appliances, mattresses, yard debris, construction and renovation debris, hot tubs, sheds, and general bulky items.
- Dump Trailer Rentals — driveway-safe 18-yard trailers for renovation, cleanout, roofing, and yard-work projects. Delivery, pickup, and disposal included.
- Cleanouts — garage, estate, storage-unit, property-management, tenant/eviction, hoarder-house, foreclosure.
- Construction Debris Removal — drywall, cabinets, flooring, scrap wood.
- Commercial — office cleanouts, shelving, retail, warehouse.
- Specialty — hot tubs, sheds (light demo), refrigerators, mattresses.

## Not accepted
Hazardous or restricted materials: chemicals, paints, propane tanks, pool chemicals, used oil, batteries, pesticides, asbestos, and biohazard waste. Bed bug–infested furniture and scrap can be handled with special disposal — always disclosed before work begins.

## How to get a quote (fastest)
Text a few clear photos of the items to (954) 247-1399. We reply quickly with a straightforward, all-inclusive price. Photo quotes work for most household, garage, and cleanout jobs. Prefer to call? (954) 247-1399, 24/7.

## Pricing
Volume-based — priced by how much space items take up in our 18-yard dump trailer, not per item. Quote includes labor, transportation, disposal/dump fees, and time on-site. No hidden fees.

## Service areas (Broward County — full coverage)
Coconut Creek, Cooper City, Coral Springs, Dania Beach, Davie, Deerfield Beach, Fort Lauderdale, Hallandale Beach, Hillsboro Beach, Hollywood, Lauderdale Lakes, Lauderdale-By-The-Sea, Lauderhill, Lighthouse Point, Margate, Miramar, North Lauderdale, Oakland Park, Parkland, Pembroke Park, Pembroke Pines, Plantation, Pompano Beach, Sea Ranch Lakes, Southwest Ranches, Sunrise, Tamarac, West Park, Weston, Wilton Manors.

## Service areas (select — Miami-Dade)
Coral Gables, Miami Lakes, Palm Springs North, Bal Harbour, Surfside, Doral, Miami, Sunny Isles Beach, Aventura.

## Service areas (select — Palm Beach)
Palm Beach, Highland Beach, Wellington, Atlantis, Boca Raton, Boynton Beach, Delray Beach.
